data.name: Title
data.value: About Us - Our Story in Design and Authenticity

data.name: HeroDesc
data.value: We don't just make furniture; we design spaces that inspire life and embody architectural sophistication.

data.name: StoryTitle
data.value: Passion for Precision, Commitment to Luxury.

data.name: StoryPara1
data.value: Ruqi Store was founded with a single vision: to provide furniture pieces that transcend functional items to become architectural masterpieces. We started as a small workshop specializing in hand woodworking, and today we are a leading destination for everyone seeking excellence in interior design.

data.name: StoryPara2
data.value: We believe that a home is a reflection of the soul, so we ensure that every piece we create carries the spirit of both authenticity and modernity.

data.name: ArchDesignDesc
data.value: We draw inspiration for our designs from timeless engineering and architectural principles, creating pieces characterized by balance and structural beauty.

data.name: SustainabilityDesc
data.value: We are committed to using sustainable resources and eco-friendly production processes to ensure a more beautiful future for us and our generations.

data.name: QualityDesc
data.value: We never compromise on quality. Every millimeter of our pieces is carefully inspected to ensure only the best reaches our customers.

data.name: Quote
data.value: We believe that beauty lies in the details that not everyone sees, but everyone who inhabits the place feels.
